title: Commissioner
description: A member of the Public Design Commission. The Commission is made up of 11 members who serve pro bono and meet once a month to review and vote on projects submitted by City agencies. Statutory composition (NYC Charter Chapter 37): an architect, a landscape architect, a painter, a sculptor, three lay members, and representatives of the Brooklyn Museum, the Metropolitan Museum of Art, the New York Public Library, and the Mayor. There is NO Open Data twin — membership is published only as HTML on the About/People page. Reverse-engineered reference object.

seat.description: The statutory seat the member fills.
